title: nie-wasm: auth flow + relay client state
description:
## What
Implement `wasm/src/client.rs`: the auth handshake (challenge-response using nie-core::auth) and relay client state (online users, event dispatch to JS callback).

## Algorithm
1. Define NieRelayClient struct in wasm/src/client.rs:
   - identity: nie_core::identity::Identity
   - transport: crate::transport::WasmTransport
   - online_users: Vec<nie_core::protocol::UserInfo> (sorted ascending by sequence field)
   - notify_js_cb: Option<js_sys::Function> (JS event callback registered by caller)
2. Implement NieRelayClient::connect(relay_url: &str, identity: Identity) -> Result<NieRelayClient, String>:
   a. Create WasmTransport::new(relay_url) → (transport, open_promise)
   b. Await open_promise (WebSocket is open)
   c. Receive the 'challenge' notification from relay:
      - Register a one-shot notify callback that captures the nonce from the first notification
      - Wait for the notification (use futures::channel::oneshot or busy-await with spawn_local)
      - Parse params.nonce from the challenge notification
   d. Sign the challenge: nie_core::auth::sign_challenge(&identity, &nonce) → (pub_key_b64, sig_b64)
   e. Send authenticate request via transport.send_request('authenticate', params):
      - params: { pub_key: pub_key_b64, nonce: nonce_str, signature: sig_b64 }
   f. Parse response: extract result.pub_id → verify it matches identity.pub_id().0
   g. After auth success, register the persistent notify callback: transport.set_notify_callback(self.on_notification_cb())
   h. Return Ok(client)
3. Implement NieRelayClient::on_notification(&self, notification_json: &str):
   - Parse JSON as serde_json::Value
   - Match on method field:
     * 'directory_list': deserialize params.online as Vec<UserInfo>; store sorted by sequence; emit DirectoryUpdated event to JS
     * 'deliver': emit MessageReceived event to JS with from + payload decoded from base64
     * 'user_joined': insert UserInfo into online list at partition_point by sequence (MLS admin election invariant); emit UserJoined event
     * 'user_left': remove from online list by pub_id; emit UserLeft event
     * 'whisper_deliver': emit WhisperReceived event to JS
     * unknown method: log warning, ignore
   - For emit: call self.notify_js_cb with serialized event as JsValue::from_str(json)
4. Implement fn send_message(&self, text: &str) -> Promise<String>:
   - Serialize ClearMessage::Chat { text: text.to_string() } as JSON bytes (nie_core::messages)
   - Send broadcast request: transport.send_request('broadcast', { payload: base64(json_bytes) })
   - Return Promise resolving to message_id from result
5. Implement fn set_nickname(&self, nick: &str) -> Promise<()>:
   - Send set_nickname request: { nickname: nick }
6. Implement fn get_online_users(&self) -> String:
   - Serialize self.online_users as JSON array

## Defensive programming
- pub_id verification after auth: if relay returns different pub_id, return Err (do not proceed)
- UserJoined insertion uses partition_point (binary search by sequence) NOT push (MLS admin election invariant from CLAUDE.md)
- on_notification() never panics on unexpected input; always warn + return on bad JSON
- Never log identity.sign() output or key material
- The only unwrap() allowed: serde_json::to_string() on derived Serialize (cannot fail)

## Agent team
Researcher: read core/src/auth.rs (sign_challenge signature), core/src/protocol.rs (UserInfo, rpc_methods), core/src/messages.rs (ClearMessage).
Implementer: write wasm/src/client.rs following algorithm.

## Tests
- cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm exits 0
- Auth flow logic is covered by auth unit tests in W2B bead
acceptance_criteria: cargo check --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p nie-wasm exits 0; auth handshake implemented using nie_core::auth::sign_challenge; UserJoined uses partition_point insertion; clippy clean
close_reason: auth flow + relay client state implemented; cargo check wasm32 passes, clippy clean
